sql_queries.title: Total Orders from Germany
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders shipped to Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany';

sql_queries.title: Total Sales from Germany
sql_queries.description: Total revenue generated from orders shipped to Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) FROM Orders AS O JOIN "Order Details" AS OD ON O.OrderID = OD.OrderID WHERE O.ShipCountry = 'Germany';

sql_queries.title: Monthly Sales Trend in Germany
sql_queries.description: Monthly sales trend for orders shipped to Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', O.OrderDate) AS SalesMonth, SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS MonthlySales FROM Orders AS O JOIN "Order Details" AS OD ON O.OrderID = OD.OrderID WHERE O.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY SalesMonth ORDER BY SalesMonth;

sql_queries.title: Top Products Sold in Germany
sql_queries.description: List of top-selling products in Germany by sales value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT P.ProductName, SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS TotalSalesValue FROM Orders AS O JOIN "Order Details" AS OD ON O.OrderID = OD.OrderID JOIN Products AS P ON OD.ProductID = P.ProductID WHERE O.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY P.ProductName ORDER BY TotalSalesValue DESC LIMIT 10;

sql_queries.title: Top Customers in Germany
sql_queries.description: List of customers in Germany with the highest total order value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT C.CompanyName, SUM(OD.UnitPrice * OD.Quantity * (1 - OD.Discount)) AS TotalOrderValue FROM Orders AS O JOIN "Order Details" AS OD ON O.OrderID = OD.OrderID JOIN Customers AS C ON O.CustomerID = C.CustomerID WHERE O.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY C.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalOrderValue DESC LIMIT 10;

sql_queries.title: Orders by German City
sql_queries.description: Distribution of orders across different cities within Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipCity, COUNT(OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY ShipCity ORDER BY NumberOfOrders DESC;

sql_queries.title: Shipping Methods for German Orders
sql_queries.description: Breakdown of shipping methods used for orders to Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT S.CompanyName AS ShipperName, COUNT(O.OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Orders AS O JOIN Shippers AS S ON O.ShipVia = S.ShipperID WHERE O.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY S.CompanyName ORDER BY NumberOfOrders DESC;
